title: Asymptotic Analysis Q5 - Linked List with Suffix-Scan Helper
general_notes: No double deduction (except in points 9 and 10).
Students can use Theta or big-O notation with tight bounds.
Intended answers: T_f(N) = Theta(N^2) and T_g(N) = Theta(N) in the worst case (when g is called from the head).
Students who explicitly compute the exact sum 1 + 2 + ... + N = Theta(N^2) for f's total cost should be awarded full marks, even if their stated per-iteration cost is the maximum Theta(N).

rubric_points.name: Splitting code into parts + referencing line numbers
rubric_points.target: Clear separation of f and g; loop vs non-loop code identified; line numbers referenced consistently.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Analysis does not clearly separate f vs g, or loops vs non-loops, and line numbers are unclear or missing.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Some attempt to separate components or refer to line numbers, but structure is incomplete or ambiguous.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Clear separation of f and g and identification of the call to g inside f's loop; line numbers referenced consistently.

rubric_points.name: Constant-time non-loop parts
rubric_points.target: All non-loop code in f and g is Theta(1).

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Non-loop code not analysed or incorrectly claimed to be non-constant.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Some constant-time segments identified but others missing.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: All non-loop regions stated as Theta(1).

rubric_points.name: f(): Loop iterations
rubric_points.target: Theta(N) iterations of the outer while loop.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Iteration count missing or not Theta(N).

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(N) but explanation is incomplete (does not say p advances by one node per iteration).

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Justifies Theta(N) because p starts at h and advances by p.next each iteration until it becomes null after visiting N nodes.

rubric_points.name: f(): Cost per iteration
rubric_points.target: Theta(N) per iteration in the worst case, dominated by the call to g(p).

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Claims Theta(1) per iteration or ignores the cost of g(p).

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Recognises the call to g but does not establish Theta(N) (e.g. says it depends on the rest of the list without committing).

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: States Theta(N) per iteration in the worst case, justified by g(p) potentially scanning the entire list from p to the end.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: No combination of iteration count and per-iteration cost, or unrelated complexity stated.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Multiplies own values but final simplification or reasoning is unclear or incorrect.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Either via Theta(N) iterations x Theta(N) worst-case per iteration = Theta(N^2), or by summing 1 + 2 + ... + N = Theta(N^2) exactly.

rubric_points.name: g(): Loop iterations
rubric_points.target: Theta(N) iterations in the worst case.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Iteration count missing or not Theta(N).

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(N) but explanation incomplete (does not justify worst-case traversal from h).

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Justifies Theta(N) by noting that q advances by q.next until null, and in the worst case (start = h) visits all N nodes.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Claims non-constant per-iteration cost.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Suggests constant time but lacks explicit Theta(1) justification.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Each iteration Theta(1): one field access q.v, one += assignment, one pointer advance, one null check.

rubric_points.name: g(): Total loop cost
rubric_points.target: Theta(N) = Theta(N) iterations x Theta(1) per iteration.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Does not combine iteration count x per-iteration cost.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: Attempts multiplication using own values but unclear or partially derived.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(N) x Theta(1) = Theta(N).

rubric_points.name: Overall worst-case runtime of g
rubric_points.target: T_g(N) = Theta(N), summing constant parts and the loop.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Runtime absent or incompatible with earlier analysis.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(N) but with missing reasoning.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(1) + Theta(N) + Theta(1) = Theta(N).

buckets.label: Internally consistent but incorrect final result
buckets.description: Final not Theta(N), but correctly summed from own earlier values.

rubric_points.name: Overall worst-case runtime of f
rubric_points.target: T_f(N) = Theta(N^2), accounting for non-loop parts + loop.

buckets.label: Wrong
buckets.description: Final complexity missing/incorrect.

buckets.label: Semi
buckets.description: States Theta(N^2) but with missing reasoning.

buckets.label: Correct
buckets.description: Theta(1) + Theta(N^2) + Theta(1) = Theta(N^2).

buckets.label: Internally consistent but incorrect final result
buckets.description: Final not Theta(N^2), but correctly summed from own earlier values.
